sections.paragraph:
ἐλάχιστος, η, ον [ἐλαχύς ‘small’] functions as superl. of μικρός ‘smallest’, hence ‘to a lowest level/degree’

—a. of status least, most insignificant Mt 2:6; 5:19b; 25:40, 45; 1 Cor 15:9; Eph 3:8. Comp. ἐλαχιστότερος less than least 1 Cor 4:3.

—b. of being very low on a scale of values least, trivial Mt 5:19a; Lk 12:26; 16:10; 19:17.

—c. of size very small Js 3:4.
